subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful for those who desire to quaff from the Kawthar of inner meanings through the gracious hands of their Lord, the Munificent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر المعانی من ایادی عطاء ربه الکریم ایاک
